title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
summary: LeRobot v0.6.0 introduces new capabilities for robotics AI: 'Imagine' for simulation-based policy training, 'Evaluate' for standardized benchmarking, and 'Improve' for iterative refinement. It focuses on making imitation and reinforcement learning more accessible for real-world robot control.
